  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    App
    Main application class for the JavaFX-based boba tea shop management system.
    CashierHomeView
    Cashier home screen view.
    CashierMenuController
    Controller for the Cashier Menu view.
    CashierMenuView
    JavaFX view for the Cashier Menu screen.
    ConfirmationController
    Controller for the order confirmation screen.
    ConfirmationView
    Wrapper view for the confirmation screen.
    DaoFactory
    Factory class responsible for creating DAO implementations.
    DatabaseConnection
    Utility class for managing database connections.
    DrinkCustomizationController
    Controller for the drink customization view in the cashier interface.
    DrinkCustomizationView
    Wrapper view for the drink customization screen.
    Employee
    Represents an employee in the system.
    EmployeeAuthDao
    Data Access Object responsible for authentication and management of employees in the database.
    EmployeeDao
    Defines database operations for managing employee records.
    EmployeeManagementView
    A JavaFX view component for managing employees in the system.
    EmployeeRecord
    Immutable record representing an employee entry.
    EmployeeRole
    Enumeration of possible employee roles in the system.
    IngredientDAO
    Data Access Object for retrieving ingredient and inventory item data.
    InMemoryEmployeeDao
    In-memory implementation of the EmployeeDao interface.
    InMemoryProductUsageDao
    In-memory implementation of ProductUsageDao.
    InMemoryReorderDao
    In-memory implementation of ReorderDao.
    InMemoryTrendsDao
    In-memory implementation of TrendsDao.
    InventoryDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) for inventory items.
    InventoryDashboardController
    Controller for the inventory dashboard view.
    InventoryDashboardView
    A placeholder view for the inventory dashboard.
    InventoryItem
    Represents an inventory item in the system.
    InventoryUsageEntry
    Immutable record representing inventory usage data.
    JdbcEmployeeDao
    JDBC implementation of the EmployeeDao interface.
    JdbcProductUsageDao
    JDBC implementation of the ProductUsageDao interface.
    JdbcReorderDao
    JDBC implementation of the ReorderDao interface.
    JdbcTrendsDao
    JDBC implementation of the TrendsDao interface.
    LoginView
     
    ManagerHomeView
    The main dashboard view for managers.
    ManagerItemManagementController
    Controller for managing menu items and inventory items.
    ManagerItemManagementController.InventoryRecord
    Data model class for inventory table rows.
    ManagerItemManagementController.MenuRecord
    Data model class for menu table rows.
    ManagerTheme
    Utility class providing consistent styling and theming for manager interface components.
    ManagerView
    Main manager interface view providing navigation between different management functions.
    MenuDAO
    Data Access Object for menu and category management.
    MenuDAO.CategoryRow
    Immutable holder for a category row from the categories table.
    MenuItem
    Represents a menu item in the system.
    MenuManagementView
    A placeholder view for menu management.
    Order
    Represents a customer order in the system.
    OrderDAO
    Data Access Object for order management.
    OrderItem
    Represents an item within a customer order.
    OrderItem.Topping
    Represents a topping added to an order item.
    OrderSummaryController
    Controller for the order summary view in the cashier interface.
    OrderSummaryView
    Wrapper view for the order summary screen.
    PhysicalCountController
    Controller for physical inventory count functionality.
    PhysicalCountController.InventoryRecord
    Inner class representing a row in the inventory table.
    ProductUsageDao
    Defines database operations for retrieving product usage data.
    ProductUsageTableView
     
    ProductUsageView
     
    ReorderDao
    Defines database operations for generating reorder recommendations.
    ReorderRecommendation
    Immutable record representing a reorder recommendation.
    ReorderSummaryView
    The ReorderSummaryView class creates the user interface that displays a summary of inventory items selected for reorder.
    ReorderView
     
    ReorderView.ReorderItemRow
     
    ReorderView.ReorderSummaryRow
     
    ReportCycleDAO
    Data Access Object for managing report cycle state.
    ReportCycleDAO.CycleState
    Represents the current state of the report cycle.
    ReportsView
     
    Router
    The Router class is responsible for handling navigation between different views in the application.
    Router.Route
    Enumeration of all available routes in the application.
    SalesReportDAO
    Data Access Object for sales reporting.
    SalesReportEntry
    Immutable record representing a sales report entry.
    SalesReportView
     
    Services
    The Services class acts as a central container for all DAO objects used by the application.
    Session
    The Session class stores temporary application state during runtime.
    TestEmployeeDAO
    Test class for EmployeeAuthDao functionality.
    TestOrderDAO
    Test class for OrderDAO functionality.
    TrendChartItem
    Immutable record representing a trend chart data point.
    TrendKpi
    Immutable record representing key performance indicators for sales trends.
    TrendsDao
    Defines database operations for retrieving sales trend data.
    TrendsTableView
     
    TrendsView
     
    TrendTableItem
    Immutable record representing a detailed trend table entry.
    XReportDAO
    Data access object for the X-Report.
    XReportDAO.HourlyRow
    Represents a row of hourly sales data for X-report display.
    XReportView
    X-Report popup window.
    ZReportDAO
    Data access object for Z-report generation.
    ZReportDAO.AlreadyGeneratedTodayException
    Exception thrown when attempting to generate a Z-report that has already been generated for the current day.
    ZReportDAO.PaymentTotal
    Represents payment totals aggregated by payment method.
    ZReportDAO.ZReportResult
    Contains the complete results of a Z-report generation.
    ZReportView
    Z-Report popup window.
